basics.name: Võ Minh Nhật Quang
basics.label: Year-3 AI Student | AI Engineer Intern Candidate
basics.summary: Third-year Artificial Intelligence student at FPT University, focused on practical AI systems: RAG, recommendation, model validation, data pipelines, and deployable web apps. Comfortable with agent-assisted coding workflows such as Pi.dev, using agents for planning, debugging, code review, and documentation while keeping work reviewable.

projects.name: OutfitMatch — AI Fashion Stylist
projects.visibility: Private GitHub + public Hugging Face artifacts
projects.stack: Python · Qdrant · graph retrieval · QLoRA · Qwen/Gemma
bullets: Built the data/knowledge-base path for a Vietnamese fashion recommendation system: catalog scraping, semantic tagging, graph retrieval, quiz reranking, and size suggestions.
Validated 5,618 catalog items; latest audit reports 0 invalid rows and a graph KB with 4,694 nodes and 316,559 canonical edges.
Published Hugging Face dataset/model artifacts for OutfitMatch experiments.

projects.name: RAG Chatbot — Document Q&A
projects.stack: FastAPI · Next.js · Qdrant · PostgreSQL · Redis · Docker
bullets: Built a document Q&A system with PDF/DOCX/MD/TXT ingestion, hybrid vector + BM25 retrieval, RRF fusion, HyDE, guard checks, and SSE streaming.
Designed an 8-service container architecture with explicit RAM budget and LLM routing.

projects.name: ORICAVI Coffee Website
bullets: Developed a static-first production website foundation with typed content boundaries, contact API seams, tests, build checks, E2E smoke, and Lighthouse workflow.

projects.name: Gisdio CMS / Website Admin
bullets: Built a CMS/admin dashboard for visual content editing, media/blog workflows, 3-role RBAC, live preview, and static HTML export.

projects.name: Water Quality Prediction Web App
bullets: Created an end-to-end regression pipeline with model comparison, reproducible train/validation/test split, exported model artifacts, Flask API, and responsive UI.

huggingface.name: VN_Fashion_data
huggingface.note: Dataset snapshot for OutfitMatch; Vietnamese fashion/e-commerce data.

huggingface.name: OutfitMatch LoRA adapters
huggingface.note: PEFT/LoRA adapters for stylist experiments on Qwen/Qwen-VL/Gemma variants.
